title: Part-Time Acai Service Crew
description:
Location: KAP Mall (6 mins walk from King Albert Park MRT DT6)

About AcaiGuru
AcaiGuru is a growing dessert brand in Singapore known for our fresh, antioxidant-rich açaí and frozen yogurt bowls. We focus on serving fresh, quality products in a warm and welcoming environment. Our first outlet at KAP Mall has built a supportive community, and we’re continuing to grow with the help of a dedicated, passionate team.


Job Description

As part of the Acaiguru team, you’ll be helping us serve up our signature açaí and froyo bowls with great energy and a welcoming attitude. Your day-to-day includes preparing bowls, handling the POS, keeping the store neat and presentable, restocking ingredients, and supporting basic opening or closing duties.

Most importantly, you’ll be someone who shows up with a good attitude, a willingness to learn, and the ability to vibe well with the team. We’re a small, close-knit crew, so we value people who are positive, responsible, and excited to grow with us as the brand expands. If you enjoy friendly customer interactions, fast-paced service, and being part of a fun environment, you’ll fit right in here.

You Will:

  • Prepare and serve açaí bowls, and menu items according to Acaiguru’s standards
  • Handle POS transactions accurately and provide warm, efficient customer service
  • Maintain cleanliness and organisation throughout the store, including food prep and dining areas
  • Support opening or closing procedures depending on rostered shifts
  • Restock ingredients, manage basic inventory levels, and ensure the store is always ready for service
  • Uphold food safety and hygiene practices at all times
  • Work closely with part-timers and support team coordination during peak periods
  • Contribute to creating a positive, friendly, and welcoming environment for both customers and teammates

You Have:

  • A good attitude, strong work ethic, and a willingness to learn
  • Friendly customer service skills and the ability to communicate well
  • Attention to detail, especially in food prep and presentation
  • Ability to follow SOPs and stay organised in a fast-paced environment
  • A team-player spirit, reliable, respectful, and able to support others during busy hours
  • Comfort working on your feet and handling peak crowds
  • Openness to feedback and personal growth

postedCompany.description:
Acaiguru is a homegrown dessert brand in Singapore that reimagines the açaí experience through innovative dessert concepts. We specialise in a unique fusion of antioxidant-rich açaí with creamy frozen yoghurt, refreshing sorbets, and thoughtfully curated toppings, offering customers a healthier yet indulgent dessert alternative.

As part of the EagleWings Group, Acaiguru is driven by a passion for creativity, quality, and genuine hospitality. We are constantly experimenting and refining our desserts to bring something fresh and exciting to the table, while maintaining high standards of consistency and service.

We believe that great desserts start with a great team. At Acaiguru, we value integrity, a positive attitude, and a willingness to learn. Prior experience is less important to us than character and commitment. We strive to build a supportive, respectful, and fast-paced work environment where every team member plays a meaningful role in our growth journey.
postedCompany.name: ACAI GURU PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D21 Upper Bukit Timah, Clementi Park, Ulu Pandan
